chunks.name: HyperbolicConeEngine

chunks.body:
class ConeFitConfig:
    curvature: float = 1.0
    dim: int = 8                 # cone-space dim (small; the octave prefix is separate)
    epochs: int = 200
    lr: float = 1e-2
    margin: float = 0.01
    neg_samples: int = 5
    seed: int = 0

    @classmethod
    def from_settings(cls, s: "ConeSettings") -> "ConeFitConfig":
        """Build from env-configurable ConeSettings; single source of truth for hyperparams."""
        return cls(
            curvature=s.curvature,
            dim=s.dim,
            epochs=s.epochs,
            lr=s.lr,
            margin=s.margin,
            neg_samples=s.neg_samples,
            seed=s.seed,
        )

class ConeFitConfig:
    curvature: float = 1.0
    dim: int = 8                 # cone-space dim (small; the octave prefix is separate)
    epochs: int = 200
    lr: float = 1e-2
    margin: float = 0.01
    neg_samples: int = 5
    seed: int = 0

    @classmethod
    def from_settings(cls, s: "ConeSettings") -> "ConeFitConfig":
        """Build from env-configurable ConeSettings; single source of truth for hyperparams."""
        return cls(
            curvature=s.curvature,
            dim=s.dim,
            epochs=s.epochs,
            lr=s.lr,
            margin=s.margin,
            neg_samples=s.neg_samples,
            seed=s.seed,
        )
